violations.text: The wall to the side of the walk-in cooler was observed in need of repair. Per the PIC, previous work on the wall had been completed. Repairs to be completed to ensure wall/gaps are properly sealed and finished. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2026

At the time of inspection, debris/droppings were observed under shelving in the dry storage area and behind the grease trap in the dish area. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid in the pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The drain plugs for the outside dumpsters are missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
